summary: 45 tests passed, 97.0% coverage, all quality gates passed

completion_promises.evidence: create_rag_retrieval_tool returns a LangChain StructuredTool (BaseTool subclass) with name='rag_retrieval' and a description. Verified by TestFactoryReturnsTool (3 tests).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Collection name is bound at factory time, not passed per call
completion_promises.evidence: collection_name is captured in the factory closure and used in get_collection(name=collection_name). The tool's args_schema only exposes 'query' and 'n_results', not 'collection_name'. Verified by TestCollectionNameBinding (2 tests).

completion_promises.criterion_text: ChromaDB PersistentClient is lazily initialised on first call
completion_promises.evidence: PersistentClient is not called during factory creation. It is created inside _get_client() on the first tool invocation using a nonlocal list holder pattern. Verified by TestLazyInitialisation (2 tests) and TestLazyImportPattern (1 test).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Subsequent calls reuse the same client connection
completion_promises.evidence: The client_holder list stores the client after first creation; subsequent calls return client_holder[0] without calling PersistentClient again. Three invocations verified to produce exactly one PersistentClient call. Verified by TestClientReuse (1 test).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Returns formatted chunks with source metadata: --- Chunk N (source: file.pdf, p.X) ---
completion_promises.evidence: Chunks formatted as '--- Chunk {i} (source: {source}, p.{page}) ---\n{text}\n' using _format_chunk helper. Verified single chunk and multi-chunk formatting plus empty results. Verified by TestFormattedOutput (3 tests).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Validates n_results: 1 <= n_results <= 20 (returns error string if out of range)
completion_promises.evidence: n_results validated at start of rag_retrieval function. Values <1 or >20 return 'Error: n_results must be between 1 and 20 inclusive' strings. Boundary values 1 and 20 accepted. Verified by TestNResultsValidation (7 tests).
rag_retrieval tool function signature has n_results: int = 5. Verified that collection.query is called with n_results=5 when not explicitly provided. Verified by TestDefaultNResults (1 test).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Returns all available chunks if collection has fewer than n_results
completion_promises.evidence: Tool formats whatever documents ChromaDB returns (even if fewer than requested). When 5 requested but only 2 returned, output contains Chunk 1 and Chunk 2 only. Verified by TestFewerChunksThanRequested (1 test).
get_collection ValueError is caught and returned as 'Error: ChromaDB collection '{name}' not found - {exc}'. No exception propagated. Verified by TestCollectionNotFound (2 tests).

completion_promises.criterion_text: ChromaDB unavailable returns error string (not exception)
completion_promises.evidence: PersistentClient creation failures (ConnectionError, RuntimeError) are caught and returned as 'Error: ChromaDB unavailable - {exc}'. No exception propagated. Verified by TestChromaDBUnavailable (2 tests).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Handles chunks with missing source metadata gracefully (returns available info)
completion_promises.evidence: _format_chunk uses dict.get with defaults: source defaults to 'unknown', page defaults to '?'. None metadata treated as empty dict. Verified with missing source, missing page, empty dict, and None metadata. Verified by TestMissingMetadata (4 tests).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Collection name with path traversal characters is rejected at factory time
completion_promises.evidence: _validate_collection_name uses regex ^[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9_-]*$ to reject path traversal (../, /, \), spaces, semicolons, dollar signs, and other unsafe characters. Raises ValueError at factory creation time, not at tool invocation. Verified with 9 bad names and 5 valid names. Verified by TestPathTraversalRejection (15 tests).

completion_promises.criterion_text: All errors returned as descriptive strings, never raised as exceptions (D7)
completion_promises.evidence: All runtime error paths (client init, collection not found, query failure, n_results validation) return descriptive error strings. Only factory-time validation (collection name) raises ValueError. Verified by TestD7ErrorStrings (2 tests) plus all error tests across other classes.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: All files (src/tools/rag_retrieval.py, src/tools/tests/test_rag_retrieval.py, pyproject.toml) pass ruff check with zero errors.
